description: Legal record (#97) in a court register/pinqas from a Karaite beit din in Cairo (on f. 32v of Yevr.-Arab. I 328). Dated 24 Sivan 5326 AM (1566 CE). Incomplete debt acknowledgment between Moshe b. ʿAbd al-Bāqī al-Levi and Farjallah b. ʿAbd al-Raḥīm Shuqayr, in which Moshe commits to repay Farjallah a sum of 8 gold jadīd within a thirteen month timespan. MCD.
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בהספרייה הלאומית רוסיה.
